name: Growth AI Analysis Runner
description: Daily (9 AM ET, Mon-Fri): Feeds top 10 growth candidates to the Growth Strategy Analyst agent for deep analysis. Stores AI scores and recommendations.

parameters.content:
## Growth AI Runner

Required: postgresApi, anthropicApi, neo4j
Uses: Growth Strategy Analyst agent
Includes Neo4j peer comparison data

parameters.query: SELECT w.ticker,t.company_name,t.sector,t.industry,t.market_cap,f.revenue_growth,f.earnings_growth,f.pe_ratio,f.gross_margin,f.operating_margin,f.roe,f.free_cash_flow,f.revenue,f.debt_to_equity FROM watchlists w JOIN tickers t ON w.ticker=t.ticker LEFT JOIN fundamentals f ON t.ticker=f.ticker AND f.period_date=(SELECT MAX(period_date) FROM fundamentals WHERE ticker=t.ticker) WHERE w.strategy='growth' AND w.status='active' ORDER BY w.score DESC LIMIT 10

MATCH (c:Company {ticker:$ticker})-[:BELONGS_TO_INDUSTRY]->(i:Industry)<-[:BELONGS_TO_INDUSTRY]-(peer:Company) WHERE peer.ticker <> $ticker WITH peer.ticker AS peer_ticker, peer.name AS peer_name, i.name AS industry OPTIONAL MATCH (peer)-[w:IN_WATCHLIST]->(wl:Watchlist) RETURN peer_ticker, peer_name, industry, collect(DISTINCT wl.name) AS on_watchlists ORDER BY peer_name LIMIT 5

parameters.systemMessage:
You are a Growth Strategy Analyst specializing in high-growth companies.

Philosophy:
- Revenue growth >15% YoY, expanding margins, strong forward guidance
- Evaluate TAM, competitive moats, accept higher P/E if justified by trajectory
- Target: Tech, Biotech, Clean Energy, AI/ML, SaaS

Analysis steps:
1. Revenue growth trends (3-5yr CAGR)
2. Earnings acceleration/deceleration
3. Management execution vs guidance
4. Competitive positioning, market share gains
5. Score 1-10 with justification

Output JSON: ticker, growth_score, revenue_growth_rate, earnings_trajectory, competitive_moat_rating, risk_factors, recommendation (STRONG_BUY/BUY/HOLD/AVOID), thesis.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO investment_scores (ticker,strategy,score_date,overall_score,recommendation,thesis,created_at) VALUES (?,'growth',CURRENT_DATE,7.0,'HOLD',?,NOW()) ON CONFLICT (ticker,strategy,score_date) DO UPDATE SET thesis=EXCLUDED.thesis;
